items.claim: Alon Cora is a significantly better striker than Stuart Nichols.
items.quote: Alon Cora has way better boxing, even better kicks.

items.claim: Stuart Nichols is unable to consistently take down Alon Cora.
items.quote: I just don't think that Corer is bad enough to get taken down consistently by Stuart Nichols.

items.claim: Stuart Nichols has been finished twice in the UFC.
items.quote: we have seen him finished already in the UFC twice.

items.claim: Anna Melissano is taking this fight on two weeks' notice.
items.quote: She steps in on two weeks notice.

items.claim: Anna Melissano is very hittable on the feet.
items.quote: She's very, very hitable on the feet

items.claim: Anna Melissano is extremely tough and durable.
Felipe Franco was submitted by Freddy Vidal on the Contender Series.
items.quote: Felipe Franco got beat by Freddy Vidal. He got submitted in that fight.

items.claim: Felipe Franco is athletic and physical with early power but lacks other skills.
items.quote: outside of being athletic and physical and having a lot of power early, I don't think he offers almost anything

items.claim: Levi Rodriguez Jr. is a better striker than Felipe Franco.
items.quote: Rodriguez is clearly the better striker here.
